title: Stylish Young Woman Sits Quietly Among Thousands
sourceTitle: Stylish Young Woman Sits Quietly Among Thousands

imagePrompts.prompt: A stylish young woman sits quietly among thousands of roaring supporters during a high-stakes football game, unintentionally caught by a distant stadium broadcast camera. Surrounded by fans waving scarves and wearing colorful team jerseys, she relaxes in her seat beneath dazzling floodlights and towering digital scoreboards. While the crowd reacts passionately to the action on the pitch, she glances off to the side with a calm, candid expression, creating a striking contrast against the electric stadium atmosphere. Realistic televised sports aesthetic, cinematic framing, authentic crowd textures, shallow depth of field, dramatic live-match lighting, ultra-detailed photorealism.
